subtitle.en: On the journey to becoming an excellent engineer.
subtitle.zh-CN: On the journey to becoming an excellent engineer.

portrait_note.en: I'm Tyler, a student who learns best by building. This site is where I keep my projects, notes, and reflections while growing into an excellent engineer.
portrait_note.zh-CN: 我是 Tyler，一名喜欢通过动手实践来学习的学生。这个网站用来记录我的项目、笔记和思考，也用来见证我一步步走向优秀工程师的过程。

section_copy.en: A short note on what I am learning, building, and gradually growing into.
section_copy.zh-CN: 简单写一写我在学什么、做什么，以及我想慢慢走向哪里。

card_body.en: This site is a quiet record of what I am learning and building: software experiments, AI-related notes, project writeups, and the small steps that gradually turn curiosity into engineering ability.
card_body.zh-CN: 这个网站用来安静地记录我正在学习和搭建的内容：软件实验、AI 相关笔记、项目复盘，以及那些把好奇心慢慢沉淀成工程能力的小步骤。

section_copy.en: Short notes, project reflections, and writing that will slowly shape the blog.
section_copy.zh-CN: 短笔记、项目复盘和一些会慢慢把博客养起来的文字。

built_with.en: Built with plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
